member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.AccountManager
member.summary: Provides account-management operations for LDAP/Active Directory entries.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.AccountManager.#ctor(Bitai.LDAPHelper.ClientConfiguration,Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.ILdapConnectionFactoryAdapter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Client configuration containing connection, credential, and search settings.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.AccountManager.#ctor(Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo,Bitai.LDAPHelper.SearchLimits,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDomainAccountCredential,Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.ILdapConnectionFactoryAdapter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.AccountManager.InitializeMissingMsADUserAccountDN(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPMsADUserAccount)
member.summary: Initializes the account distinguished name when it is missing.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.AccountManager.CreateUserAccountForMsAD(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPMsADUserAccount,System.String)
member.summary: Create a username in MS Active Directory service https://www.rlmueller.net/Name_Attributes.htm
member.param: Optional tag to mark the request and/or response.
member.returns: A Task of

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.AccountManager.SetMsADUserAccountPassword(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set a password for a username in MS Active Directory service. This method will verify the authenticity of the username by its distinguished name before trying to set the password. If the username is not valid, the operation will not be attempted and an error will be returned.
member.param: Identifier attribute used to resolve the user account (sAMAccountName or distinguishedName).
Optional tag to mark the request and/or response.
True if the MS AD user account will be tested to verify authentication with the new password. False if the password will simply be assigned and authentication will not be tested.
member.returns: A task with the password-update operation result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.AccountManager.DisableMsADUserAccount(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Disables a username in MS Active Directory. This method validates the target account first.
member.param: Identifier attribute used to resolve the user account (sAMAccountName or distinguishedName).
Optional tag to mark the request and/or response.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.AccountManager.RemoveMsADUserAccount(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Remove a username in MS Active Directory service. This operation will permanently delete the username entry from the directory, so it should be used with caution.
member.param: Identifier attribute used to resolve the user account (sAMAccountName or distinguishedName).
Optional tag to mark the request and/or response.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Authenticator
member.summary: Provides LDAP authentication workflows for domain-account and distinguished-name credentials.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Authenticator.#ctor(Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo,Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.ILdapConnectionFactoryAdapter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Authenticator.AuthenticateAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDomainAccountCredential,Bitai.LDAPHelper.SearchLimits,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDomainAccountCredential,System.String)
member.summary: Authenticates a domain account and validates that exactly one matching LDAP user exists.
member.param: Search limits used to locate the account before authentication.
Credential used to perform the validation search.
Optional label used to correlate request/response operations.
member.returns: A result object containing operation status, authentication status, and optional error details.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Authenticator.AuthenticateAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDomainAccountCredential,System.String)
member.summary: Authenticates a domain account directly against the LDAP server.
member.param: Optional label used to correlate request/response operations.
member.returns: A result object containing operation status, authentication status, and optional error details.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Authenticator.AuthenticateAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDistinguishedNameCredential,Bitai.LDAPHelper.SearchLimits,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDomainAccountCredential,System.String)
member.summary: Authenticates a distinguished-name account and validates that exactly one matching LDAP user exists.
member.param: Search limits used to locate the account before authentication.
Credential used to perform the validation search.
Optional label used to correlate request/response operations.
member.returns: A result object containing operation status, authentication status, and optional error details.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Authenticator.AuthenticateAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDistinguishedNameCredential,System.String)
member.summary: Authenticates a distinguished-name account directly against the LDAP server.
member.param: Optional label used to correlate request/response operations.
member.returns: A result object containing operation status, authentication status, and optional error details.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.BaseHelper
member.summary: Base class for LDAP helper services, providing shared connection and mapping utilities.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.BaseHelper.ConnectionInfo
member.summary: Gets or sets LDAP server connection settings.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.BaseHelper.DomainAccountCredential
member.summary: Gets or sets the credential used for LDAP search/management operations.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.BaseHelper.SearchLimits
member.summary: Gets or sets default LDAP search limits.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.BaseHelper.ConnectionFactory
member.summary: Gets or sets the LDAP connection factory abstraction.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.BaseHelper.#ctor(Bitai.LDAPHelper.ClientConfiguration,Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.ILdapConnectionFactoryAdapter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Client configuration containing connection, credential, and search settings.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.BaseHelper.#ctor(Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo,Bitai.LDAPHelper.SearchLimits,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDomainAccountCredential,Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.ILdapConnectionFactoryAdapter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.BaseHelper.#ctor(Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo,Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.ILdapConnectionFactoryAdapter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class used by authentication-only services.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.BaseHelper.GetSAMAccountTypeName(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a SAM account-type numeric code to a symbolic name.
member.param: String representation of the SAM account type numeric value.
member.returns: A symbolic account type name when known; otherwise the original value.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.BaseHelper.GetLdapConnection(Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDomainAccountCredential,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates and optionally binds an LDAP connection using domain-account credentials.
member.returns: A task with an initialized LDAP connection adapter.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.BaseHelper.GetLdapConnection(Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDistinguishedNameCredential,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates and optionally binds an LDAP connection using distinguished-name credentials.
member.returns: A task with an initialized LDAP connection adapter.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.BaseHelper.ConvertByteToStringSid(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Converts a binary SID value into its canonical string representation.
member.returns: Canonical SID string (for example, S-1-5-21-...).

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.BaseHelper.GetRequiredAttributeNames(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.RequiredEntryAttributes)
member.summary: Resolves the LDAP attribute names to request based on a predefined attribute-set preset.
member.param: Preset indicating which attributes should be loaded.
member.returns: A sequence of attribute names to request in LDAP search operations.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.ClientConfiguration
member.summary: Encapsulates LDAP client runtime configuration.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.ClientConfiguration.ServerSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets LDAP server connection settings.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.ClientConfiguration.DomainAccountCredential
member.summary: Gets or sets the service account used for LDAP operations.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.ClientConfiguration.SearchLimits
member.summary: Gets or sets LDAP search limits.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.ClientConfiguration.#ctor(Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDomainAccountCredential,Bitai.LDAPHelper.SearchLimits)
member.summary: Constructor
member.param: Domain account credential used for bind/search operations.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo
member.summary: Represents LDAP server connection settings.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Int16)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: LDAP server host name or IP address.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo.Server
member.summary: Gets the LDAP server host name or IP address.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo.ServerPort
member.summary: Gets the LDAP server port.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo.UseSSL
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether SSL is enabled.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo.ConnectionTimeout
member.summary: Connection timeout in seconds

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.DataValidationException
member.summary: Represents errors caused by invalid or inconsistent business data supplied to LDAP operations.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.DataValidationException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.DataValidationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a message.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.DataValidationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a message and inner exception.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.EntryNotFoundException
member.summary: Represents errors when a requested LDAP entry cannot be found.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.EntryNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a message.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.EntryNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a message and inner exception.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapServerDefaultPorts
member.summary: LDAP default ports

member.summary: Default LDAP port.

member.name: F:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapServerDefaultPorts.DefaultSslPort
member.summary: Default LDAP-over-SSL port.

member.name: F:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapServerDefaultPorts.DefaultGlobalCatalogPort
member.summary: Default Global Catalog port.

member.name: F:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapServerDefaultPorts.DefaultGlobalCatalogSslPort
member.summary: Default Global Catalog SSL port.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Extensions.IEnumerableLDAPEntryExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for LDAP entry collections.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Extensions.IEnumerableLDAPEntryExtensions.SelectAllMemberOfEntriesRecursively(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPEntry})
member.summary: Flattens all memberOfEntries hierarchies recursively for every entry in the sequence.
member.returns: A distinct flattened sequence of parent/group entries.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Extensions.StringExtensions
member.summary: Provides LDAP-safe string escaping helpers.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceParenthesisCharsToScapedChars(System.String)
member.summary: Escapes parenthesis characters for LDAP filter usage.
member.returns: Escaped text.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceAsteriskCharsToScapedChars(System.String)
member.summary: Escapes asterisk characters for LDAP filter usage.
member.returns: Escaped text.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceBackslashCharsToScapedChars(System.String)
member.summary: Escapes backslash characters for LDAP filter usage.
member.returns: Escaped text.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Extensions.StringExtensions.ReplaceSpecialCharsToScapedChars(System.String)
member.summary: Escapes special LDAP filter characters (backslash, asterisk, parenthesis).
member.returns: Escaped text.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.GroupMembershipValidator
member.summary: Validates group membership relationships for directory users.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.GroupMembershipValidator.#ctor(Bitai.LDAPHelper.ClientConfiguration,Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.ILdapConnectionFactoryAdapter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Client configuration containing connection, credential, and search settings.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.GroupMembershipValidator.#ctor(Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo,Bitai.LDAPHelper.SearchLimits,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDomainAccountCredential,Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.ILdapConnectionFactoryAdapter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Credential used to execute LDAP searches.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.GroupMembershipValidator.CheckGroupMembershipAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the directory entry identified by the specified is a member (directly or indirectly) of the group whose common name (CN) is specified by .
member.param: The sAMAccountName of the entry to check. Must not be null, empty or contain '*'.
The CN (common name) of the parent group to check membership against. Must not be null, empty or contain '*'.
member.exception: Thrown when or is null or empty.
Thrown when or contains the '*' character.
Thrown when the underlying LDAP search operation fails. If available, the original search error object is thrown instead.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.GroupMembershipValidator.GetAllGroupMembershipsAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves all group memberships (common names - CNs) for the directory entry identified by the specified . This method performs a parent-entry search (resolving memberOf relationships) and returns the distinct CN values of all parent/group entries discovered.
member.param: The sAMAccountName of the entry whose group memberships are to be retrieved. This parameter must not be null or empty and must not contain the '*' character.
member.returns: An array of group common names (CNs) the specified entry is a member of. If the entry is not found, an empty string array is returned. The returned CNs are unique and compared case-insensitively.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or empty.
Thrown when the underlying LDAP search operation fails. If the search result contains an error object, that original exception object will be thrown instead.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapAttributeAdapter
member.summary: Adapter for .

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapAttributeAdapter.#ctor(Novell.Directory.Ldap.LdapAttribute)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapAttributeSetAdapter
member.summary: Adapter that wraps a from the Novell LDAP library and exposes it through the interface expected by the application.

member.name: F:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapAttributeSetAdapter._attributeSet
member.summary: The underlying Novell LDAP attribute set being adapted.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapAttributeSetAdapter.#ctor(Novell.Directory.Ldap.LdapAttributeSet)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class that wraps the specified .
member.param: The instance to wrap. Must not be null.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapAttributeSetAdapter.ContainsKey(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the attribute set contains an attribute with the specified name.
member.param: The name of the attribute to locate.
member.returns: true if the attribute set contains an attribute with the specified name; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapAttributeSetAdapter.GetAttribute(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves an attribute by name from the underlying .
member.param: The name of the attribute to retrieve.
member.returns: An that wraps the found , or null if no attribute with the specified name exists.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapAttributeSetAdapter.AddAttribute(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a single-valued string attribute to the underlying .
member.param: The string value for the attribute.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapAttributeSetAdapter.AddAttribute(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Adds a multi-valued string attribute to the underlying .
member.param: An array of string values for the attribute.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapAttributeSetAdapter.AddAttribute(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Adds a binary (byte array) attribute to the underlying .
member.param: The byte array value for the attribute.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapAttributeSetAdapter.GetWrappedAttributeSet
member.summary: Returns the wrapped instance.
member.returns: The underlying that this adapter wraps.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter
member.summary: Adapter that exposes a Novell.Directory.Ldap.LdapConnection through the project's abstraction.
member.remarks: This adapter forwards calls to the wrapped instance and translates between the project's adapter types and Novell.Directory.Ldap types where necessary. The adapter is responsible for the lifetime of the wrapped connection when disposed.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.#ctor(Novell.Directory.Ldap.LdapConnection)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The instance to wrap. Must not be null.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.ConnectionTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection timeout (in milliseconds) for operations on the wrapped connection.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.SecureSocketLayer
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Secure Socket Layer (SSL) is enabled on the wrapped connection.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.IsBound
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the wrapped connection is currently bound (authenticated).

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.ServerCertificateValidationByPass
member.summary: Adds a user-defined server certificate validation delegate that unconditionally accepts the server certificate.
member.remarks: Use with caution: this bypasses standard SSL server certificate validation for the wrapped connection instance. It attaches a delegate that returns true for any certificate validation request.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.ConnectAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Asynchronously connects to the specified LDAP server.
member.param: The LDAP server host name or IP address.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous connect operation.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.BindAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously binds (authenticates) the wrapped connection using the supplied distinguished name and password.
member.param: The distinguished name (DN) of the user to bind as.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous bind operation.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.SearchAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.ISearchLimits,System.String,System.String[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Performs an asynchronous LDAP search and returns a search queue adapter.
member.param: The base DN from which to start the search.
The scope of the search (base, one-level, or subtree) as expected by the Novell API.
An array of attribute names to return. Passing null requests all attributes.
Whether to return only attribute types (no values).
Optional search constraints adapter which will be translated to the Novell constraints type.
member.returns: A task that produces an wrapping the resulting .

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.CreateAttributeSet
member.summary: Creates a new instance wrapping an empty .
member.returns: An adapter for constructing attribute sets to supply to add/modify operations.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.AddEntryAsync(System.String,Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.ILdapAttributeSetAdapter)
member.summary: Adds an LDAP entry with the specified distinguished name and attributes.
member.param: The distinguished name (DN) of the new entry.
An attribute set adapter providing attributes for the new entry.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous add operation.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.ModifyEntryAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.ILdapModificationAdapter})
member.summary: Modifies an existing LDAP entry using the supplied modifications.
member.param: The distinguished name (DN) of the entry to modify.
A collection of modification adapters describing the changes to apply.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous modify operation.
member.exception: If any element of is not a .

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.DeleteEntryAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes the LDAP entry with the specified distinguished name.
member.param: The distinguished name (DN) of the entry to delete.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous delete operation.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.CreateModification(Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.LdapModificationType,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Creates an instance representing a single modification operation.
member.param: The modification type (Add, Delete, Replace) defined by .
The name of the attribute to modify.

The value to use for the modification. Supported runtime types:
- binary attribute value
- multi-valued string attribute
other - will be converted to string via ToString()
member.returns: An wrapping the underlying .
member.exception: Thrown if is not one of the supported modification types.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.Disconnect
member.summary: Disconnects the wrapped LDAP connection.
member.remarks: After calling , the connection object may need to be reconnected before reuse. This method does not dispose the wrapped connection; call to release resources.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by the adapter and the wrapped .

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionAdapter.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Protected implementation of the standard disposal pattern.
member.param: true when called from to dispose managed resources; false when called from a finalizer.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapConnectionFactoryAdapter
member.summary: Factory for creating Novell LDAP connection adapters.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapEntryAdapter
member.summary: Adapter for .

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapEntryAdapter.#ctor(Novell.Directory.Ldap.LdapEntry)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapMessageAdapter
member.summary: Adapter for .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapModificationAdapter
member.summary: Adapter that wraps a instance and exposes it through the interface.
member.remarks: This adapter provides a lightweight wrapper around Novell.Directory.Ldap's , translating the native modification operation and attribute into the project's adapter abstractions.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapModificationAdapter.#ctor(Novell.Directory.Ldap.LdapModification)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The instance to wrap. May be null only if callers handle it; this adapter does not perform null checks.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapModificationAdapter.ModificationType
member.summary: Gets the modification operation type mapped to the project's enumeration.
member.remarks: The value is obtained from the wrapped and cast to .

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapModificationAdapter.Attribute
member.summary: Gets an representing the attribute involved in this modification.
member.remarks: The returned adapter wraps the underlying instance from the wrapped .

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapModificationAdapter.GetWrappedModification
member.summary: Returns the underlying instance wrapped by this adapter.
member.returns: The original object supplied to the adapter.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.Novell.NovellLdapSearchQueueAdapter
member.summary: Adapter for .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapOperationException
member.summary: Represents generic LDAP operation failures in helper workflows.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapOperationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a message.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapOperationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a message and inner exception.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilter
member.summary: Represents a single LDAP attribute filter expression.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilter.FilterAttribute
member.summary: Gets the target LDAP attribute.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilter.FilterValue
member.summary: Gets the filter value.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilter.IsFilterNegated
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this filter is negated.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilter.Generated
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the LDAP text has already been generated.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilter.#ctor(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute,Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.FilterValue)
member.summary: Initializes a new non-negated attribute filter.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilter.#ctor(System.Boolean,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute,Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.FilterValue)
member.summary: Initializes a new attribute filter.
member.param: Whether the generated filter is negated.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilter.ToString
member.summary: Generates the LDAP filter text for this instance.
member.returns: LDAP filter expression.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilter.Reset
member.summary: Resets generated-state so the filter text is rebuilt on next call.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilterCombiner
member.summary: Combines multiple LDAP filter components into a single LDAP expression.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilterCombiner.CreateOnlyUsersFilterCombiner
member.summary: Creates a filter combiner that targets user entries and excludes computers and groups.
member.returns: A composed LDAP filter combiner.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilterCombiner.CreateOnlyGroupsFilterCombiner
member.summary: Creates a filter combiner that targets group entries and excludes users and computers.
member.returns: A composed LDAP filter combiner.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilterCombiner.IsCombinerNegated
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the combined expression is negated.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilterCombiner.ConjunctiveFilters
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether filters are combined conjunctively (AND) or disjunctively (OR).

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilterCombiner.Generated
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the LDAP text has already been generated.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilterCombiner.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new non-negated conjunctive combiner.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilterCombiner.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new combiner.
member.param: Whether the full expression is negated.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilterCombiner.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.ICombinableFilter})
member.summary: Initializes a new combiner with initial filter components.
member.param: Whether the full expression is negated.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilterCombiner.ToString
member.summary: Generates LDAP filter text for all contained filter components.
member.returns: LDAP filter expression.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.AttributeFilterCombiner.Reset
member.summary: Resets generated-state so filter text is rebuilt on next call.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.FilterValue
member.summary: Represents a validated LDAP filter value.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.FilterValue.Value
member.summary: Gets the raw value used in LDAP filters.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.FilterValue.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.exception: Thrown when is null, empty, or whitespace.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.FilterValue.ToString
member.summary: Returns the filter value text.
member.returns: The raw filter value.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.ICombinableFilter
member.summary: Defines a filter component that can generate LDAP filter text and be combined with others.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.ICombinableFilter.Generated
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the filter text has already been generated.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.ICombinableFilter.Reset
member.summary: Resets generated-state so filter text is rebuilt on next call.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.ICombinableFilter.ToString
member.summary: Generates LDAP filter text.
member.returns: LDAP filter expression.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Searcher
member.summary: Performs LDAP search operations and maps results into DTO models.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Searcher.#ctor(Bitai.LDAPHelper.ClientConfiguration,Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.ILdapConnectionFactoryAdapter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Client configuration containing connection, credential, and search settings.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Searcher.#ctor(Bitai.LDAPHelper.ConnectionInfo,Bitai.LDAPHelper.SearchLimits,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDomainAccountCredential,Bitai.LDAPHelper.LdapAdapters.ILdapConnectionFactoryAdapter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Credential used to execute LDAP searches.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Searcher.SearchEntriesAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.ICombinableFilter,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.RequiredEntryAttributes,System.String)
member.summary: Searches for entries matching the provided LDAP filter and loads the requested attributes.
member.param: A combinable LDAP filter that identifies the entries to search for. This filter will be converted to its string representation and used directly in the LDAP search operation.
The set of attributes to load for each entry returned in the search result. Use this to limit attributes loaded for performance (for example, OnlyMemberOf, Few, All, etc.).
Optional label/tag that will be set on the returned LDAPSearchResult and on created LDAPEntry instances to help callers correlate operations and results.
member.returns: A task that resolves to an containing the entries found and any operation message. If an error occurs, the returned LDAPSearchResult will have IsSuccessfulOperation == false and contain error details.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.Searcher.SearchParentEntriesAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.QueryFilters.ICombinableFilter,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.RequiredEntryAttributes,System.String)
member.summary: Searches for parent entries (groups or containers) for the entries matched by the provided filter, then loads those parent entries (listed in memberOf attibute) with the requested attributes.
member.param: A combinable LDAP filter that identifies the starting entries whose parent membership (memberOf) will be traversed. This filter is used only to find the initial set of entries; the method then resolves their memberOf hierarchy.
The set of attributes to load for each parent entry returned in the final result. Use this to limit attributes loaded for performance (for example, OnlyMemberOf, Few, All, etc.).
Optional label/tag that will be set on the returned LDAPSearchResult and on created LDAPEntry instances to help callers correlate operations and results.
member.returns: A task that resolves to an containing the parent entries found and any operation message. If an error occurs, the returned LDAPSearchResult will have IsSuccessfulOperation == false and contain error details.
member.remarks: The method first performs a partial search requesting only memberOf to discover group/container relationships. It then traverses parents recursively (using the entry recursion helper) and performs targeted searches by distinguishedName to load the requested attributes for each discovered parent. Any LDAP or general exception is captured and returned as an unsuccessful LDAPSearchResult rather than being thrown.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPHelper.SearchLimits
member.summary: Represents LDAP search boundaries and server limits.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.SearchLimits.BaseDN
member.summary: The base distinguished name (DN) to search from.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.SearchLimits.LdapSearchScope
member.summary: The scope of the search operation, which determines how deep the search will go in the directory tree.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.SearchLimits.MaxSearchResults
member.summary: Maximum number of search results (entries) to be returned for a search operation. A value of 0 means no limit. Default: 1000 The search operation will be terminated with an LdapException.SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED if the number of results exceed the maximum.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPHelper.SearchLimits.MaxSearchTimeout
member.summary: Maximum number of seconds that the server waits when returning search results. The search operation will be terminated with an LdapException.TIME_LIMIT_EXCEEDED if the operation exceeds the time limit.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPHelper.SearchLimits.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Base distinguished name to use for searches.
